description: An investigator suspects a host is compromised with fileless malware living only in memory. They must perform a memory analysis.

nodes.task_description: Capture a live memory image (RAM dump) from the running suspect host.

expected_outcome.expected: Investigator successfully acquires the memory image without crashing the system.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the memory image for signs of malicious processes or injected code.

expected_outcome.expected: Investigator identifies a suspicious process that has no corresponding file on disk.

nodes.task_description: Dump the suspicious process from memory and perform reverse engineering on it to understand its capabilities.

expected_outcome.expected: Investigator confirms the process is a malicious implant and understands its function.
